mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_ID as groupId, GROUP_NM as groupNm, GROUP_DC as groupDc, GROUP_CREAT_DE as groupCreatDe FROM LETTNAUTHORGROUPINFO WHERE 1=1 AND GROUP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY GROUP_CREAT_DE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNAUTHORGROUPINFO WHERE 1=1 AND GROUP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
